module.name: phyto_source_badge
module.description: Displays coloured sourcing origin badges on product listing cards and product pages to communicate how and where each plant was produced — for example Tissue Culture, Wild Collected, Nursery Grown, or Imported. Admin defines badge definitions with custom labels, colours, and slugs, then assigns them to individual products along with permit reference numbers and origin country. Badges appear as pill overlays near the price on listings and in a dedicated "Source and Origin" tab on the product page.
module.author: PhytoCommerce
